A.label: baseline
A.description: RBF-only, same grid as ensemble_loso (6 configs, LogReg K probe, 300 comp, f_classif)

B.label: wide_gamma
B.description: 20-config gamma×C grid (finer gamma sweep + higher C values)

C.label: rbf_k_probe
C.description: Use RBF (not LogReg) to select best K — gamma=0.05, C=1.0 probe

G.label: mi_select
G.description: mutual_info_classif instead of f_classif for SelectKBest
